gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/491)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/491)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) وَ ذَكَرَ مَسْجِدَ السَّهْلَةِ فَقَالَ أَمَا إِنَّهُ مَنْزِلُ صَاحِبِنَا إِذَا قَامَ بِأَهْلِهِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ali Bin Al-Hassan Bin Ali, from Usman, from Salih Bin Abu Aswad who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said, and Masjid Al-Sahla was mentioned, he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘But, it would an encampment for our<sup>asws</sup> companions (Al-Qaim<sup>asws</sup>) when he<sup>asws</sup> arises with his<sup>asws</sup> people’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ali ibn al-Hassan ibn Ali from ‘Uthman from Salih ibn abu al-Aswad who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, when al-Sahlah Masjid was mentioned, said, ‘It is the dwelling of our companion when he rises (with Divine Authority).”’
